title: CreditFactorModel
description: Fully self-contained credit factor hierarchy model artifact. Canonical Rust type: finstack_core::factor_model::credit_hierarchy::CreditFactorModel. Schema version constant: finstack.credit_factor_model/1.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Consumers must validate this field before trusting any other field.

issuer_betas.description: Per-issuer beta rows, sorted by issuer_id for wire stability.

factor_histories.description: Embedded factor histories. null indicates an externally-referenced history store.

HierarchyDimension.title: HierarchyDimension
HierarchyDimension.description: A single level in the credit factor hierarchy. Built-in variants use snake_case; Custom carries an arbitrary user string.

oneOf.description: Credit rating bucket (e.g. IG, HY, NR).

CreditHierarchySpec.title: CreditHierarchySpec
CreditHierarchySpec.description: Ordered list of hierarchy dimensions, broadest to narrowest.

GenericFactorSpec.title: GenericFactorSpec
GenericFactorSpec.description: Reference to the generic (PC) time series used as the first factor.

name.description: Human-readable name for the generic factor (e.g. CDX IG 5Y).

series_id.description: Caller's time-series identifier, used to look up the input data.

IssuerBetaPolicy.title: IssuerBetaPolicy
IssuerBetaPolicy.description: Calibration policy governing which issuers receive a per-issuer regression.

oneOf.description: Regression gated on minimum history threshold with per-issuer overrides.

min_history.description: Minimum monthly return observations needed to attempt OLS. Default is 24.

overrides.description: Per-issuer overrides keyed by issuer ID.

oneOf.description: Every issuer treated as BucketOnly; no per-issuer regression is run.

IssuerBetaMode.title: IssuerBetaMode
IssuerBetaMode.description: Resolved regression mode stored in the calibrated artifact.

AdderVolSource.title: AdderVolSource
AdderVolSource.description: Source provenance of an issuer's idiosyncratic vol estimate.

oneOf.description: Estimated from the issuer's own residual history.

peer_bucket.description: Dotted bucket path used as proxy (e.g. IG.EU.FIN).

oneOf.description: Supplied directly by the caller at calibration time.

FitQuality.title: FitQuality
FitQuality.description: Regression quality statistics for a single issuer. Only present for issuer_beta mode.

residual_std.description: Residual standard deviation in spread-return units.

n_obs.description: Number of monthly observations used in the regression.

IssuerBetas.title: IssuerBetas
IssuerBetas.description: Factor beta loadings for a single issuer.

pc.description: Beta on the generic credit PC factor.

levels.description: Betas on each hierarchy-level factor, in spec order. All 1.0 for BucketOnly issuers.

IssuerTags.title: IssuerTags
IssuerTags.description: Flat key-value taxonomy tags for an issuer.

IssuerBetaRow.title: IssuerBetaRow
IssuerBetaRow.description: Per-issuer beta row in the calibrated artifact.

issuer_id.description: Unique issuer identifier (e.g. LEI or internal code).

adder_at_anchor.description: Value of the issuer's idiosyncratic adder at as_of (carry component).

adder_vol_annualized.description: Annualized idiosyncratic adder volatility (for vol forecasting).

fit_quality.description: Regression fit statistics. null when mode == bucket_only.

LevelAnchor.title: LevelAnchor
LevelAnchor.description: Factor level values for a single hierarchy level at the calibration anchor date.

level_index.description: Zero-based index of this level in CreditHierarchySpec.levels.

values.description: Factor level values keyed by dotted bucket path (e.g. IG.EU.FIN).

LevelsAtAnchor.title: LevelsAtAnchor
LevelsAtAnchor.description: Snapshot of all factor levels at the calibration anchor date.

pc.description: Value of the generic PC factor at as_of.

by_level.description: Per-level anchor values in hierarchy spec order.

FactorCorrelationMatrix.title: FactorCorrelationMatrix
FactorCorrelationMatrix.description: Static factor correlation matrix ρ for the covariance decomposition Σ(t) = D(t) · ρ · D(t).

factor_ids.description: Factor IDs defining the row/column ordering.

data.description: Row-major correlation data. data[i] is row i.

FactorVolModel.title: FactorVolModel
FactorVolModel.description: Volatility model for a single factor.

variance.description: Annualized variance estimate for this factor.

IdiosyncraticVolModel.title: IdiosyncraticVolModel
IdiosyncraticVolModel.description: Volatility model for an issuer's idiosyncratic adder.

oneOf.description: Simple sample-variance estimate for the idiosyncratic adder.

variance.description: Annualized variance of the issuer's idiosyncratic adder.

VolState.title: VolState
VolState.description: Complete vol state for all factors and all issuers at the calibration date.

factors.description: Vol model for each systematic factor, keyed by factor ID.

idiosyncratic.description: Idiosyncratic vol model for each issuer, keyed by issuer ID.

dates.description: Ordered observation dates aligned with value vectors.

values.description: Factor return series keyed by factor ID. Each vector has dates.length entries.

FoldUpRecord.title: FoldUpRecord
FoldUpRecord.description: Record of a single fold-up event during calibration.

level_index.description: Hierarchy level at which fold-up occurred.

original_bucket.description: Bucket path before the fold-up (e.g. IG.EU.FIN).

folded_to.description: Bucket path after the fold-up (e.g. IG.EU).

CalibrationDiagnostics.title: CalibrationDiagnostics
CalibrationDiagnostics.description: Structured diagnostics attached to every calibrated artifact.

mode_counts.description: Count of resolved IssuerBetaMode values. Keys: issuer_beta, bucket_only.

bucket_sizes_per_level.description: One entry per hierarchy level: map of bucket_path to IssuerBeta count.

fold_ups.description: Log of all fold-up events triggered by insufficient bucket coverage.

oneOf.description: Histogram of per-issuer R² values bucketed as string ranges.

tag_taxonomy.description: Canonical tag taxonomy observed during calibration. Keys: dimension names; values: arrays of distinct tag values.
